  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,

  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The artifact contains a chain of reasoning from architecture diversity → ensemble gain → broker design recommendation; logical coherence of that chain is a plausible review target under any interpretation of 'take a look'.",
    "R1.3": "Multiple specific quantitative claims (63% disagreement-to-novelty rate, macro-F1 0.81, 4–7 point gains, rare-class F1 0.55) are asserted without inline evidence; checking whether stated figures are internally consistent and properly qualified is centrally relevant.",
    "R1.6": "The phrasing 'take a look at this paragraph' is the canonical prompt for prose/writing feedback, making sentence- and paragraph-level quality a plausibly load-bearing dimension."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you asking for feedback on the writing and prose quality, or on the scientific claims and evidence alignment — or both?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a chain of reasoning from architecture diversity → ensemble gain → broker design recommendation; logical coherence of that chain is a plausible review target under any interpretation of 'take a look'.
rationale.R1.3: Multiple specific quantitative claims (63% disagreement-to-novelty rate, macro-F1 0.81, 4–7 point gains, rare-class F1 0.55) are asserted without inline evidence; checking whether stated figures are internally consistent and properly qualified is centrally relevant.
rationale.R1.6: The phrasing 'take a look at this paragraph' is the canonical prompt for prose/writing feedback, making sentence- and paragraph-level quality a plausibly load-bearing dimension.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for feedback on the writing and prose quality, or on the scientific claims and evidence alignment — or both?
